reference.title: Order Management API Errors
reference.shortdesc: List of possible error codes and their solutions.

section.title: 400 - Bad Request
section.p: The request contains invalid or missing data.
Solution: Verify all required fields before sending the request.

section.title: 401 - Unauthorized
section.p: Solution: Check that the API key is valid and correctly configured.

section.title: 404 - Not Found
section.p: The requested resource does not exist.
Solution: Verify the endpoint URL and resource identifier.

section.title: 500 - Internal Server Error
section.p: Solution: Retry the request later or contact support.
NOTE: If the error code is not listed here, contact your support at ordermanagementapi@support.com
